title: Destiny Aigbe | Managing Partner of Dark Alpha Capital | Dark Alpha Capital
content:
# Destiny Aigbe

Managing Partner

[SET AN APPOINTMENT](https://calendly.com/darkalphacapital)

## About Destiny

At Dark Alpha Capital, Destiny focuses on identifying, acquiring, and nurturing private companies with substantial potential for growth, innovation, and long-term value creation. He partners with seasoned investors, including specialized financial institutions and entrepreneurs with considerable experience owning and managing private companies, to secure funds for investment in favorable businesses. Leveraging strong partnerships with investors and management teams of portfolio companies, Destiny implements extensive strategies to enhance the operational efficiency of acquired businesses.

Mr. Aigbe leads the team at Dark Alpha Capital and manages the systems, processes, and people needed to review about 1,500 potential investments per year. Mr. Aigbe works closely with capital providers to purchase companies in the leveraged buyout (LBO) context. Having established a robust foundation in law, private equity, public and private offerings, and mergers & acquisitions, Destiny has forged a successful path as a distinguished Independent Sponsor. Capitalizing on his expansive network and trusted deal-sourcing channels, he actively seeks investment opportunities underpinned by strong growth drivers and the potential to become market leaders. Working closely with investors and potential financing partners, Destiny structures deals aligned with all parties’ interests to mitigate risks and maximize value creation.

As an attorney, Destiny Aigbe has played an indispensable part in enabling companies across select sectors to raise capital worth $75 million, showcasing his expertise in securing funding, bolstering investor confidence, and putting target companies on the path of growth. In the past 6 years, he has completed 8 mergers & acquisitions and 6 going-public transactions by reverse merger. Further, Destiny represented 27+ start-ups and small businesses in the United States, Asia, and Europe. He has also worked and interfaced with the SEC, FINRA, OTC Markets, and broker-dealers for issuer compliance. He has quarterbacked going public transactions and guided teams involving investor relations personnel, PCAOB auditors, company accountants, and transfer agents enabling companies to go public.

Separately, Mr. Aigbe was the CEO and President of a publicly traded company where he served for 4 years. Destiny was instrumental in raising capital for several projects that resulted in the acquisition of 7 companies that led to the growth in the company’s market value from $250,000 to $150,000,000.

Mr. Aigbe graduated from the University of Maryland, College Park with a B.S. in Finance with Honors. Mr. Aigbe also attended Vanderbilt University Law School where he obtained his J.D. and a certificate in Law and Business.
